rubric_items.reasoning: The agent fully completed the task. It correctly diagnosed the root cause (StatefulSet hardcoded the wrong namespace `.default.svc.cluster.local` in `--advertise-host` and `--join` instead of `.cockroachdb.svc.cluster.local`), patched the StatefulSet, force-restarted all 3 pods to pick up the new spec, and ran `cockroach init` to initialize the cluster. The oracle verdict is pass, and the node status output confirms all 3 nodes are `is_available=true` and `is_live=true` with SQL accepting connections.
